heading: utils.crypto.hash()
body:
Generates a hash value for the provided input using the specified
hash function.

```typescript
utils.crypto.hash(
  hash_function: string,
  input: string | BSON.Binary
): BSON.Binary
```

| Parameter      | Type                  | Description                                                                                       |
| -------------- | --------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| hash\_function | string                | The name of the hashing function. The following functions are supported: "sha1", "sha256", "md5". |
| input          | string or BSON.Binary | Required. The input for which you would like to generate a hash value.                            |

codeBlocks.content:
utils.crypto.hash(
  hash_function: string,
  input: string | BSON.Binary
): BSON.Binary
